who: finance officers at law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month
offer: For finance officers at law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month, manual reconciliation causes compliance risks. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: manual reconciliation processes lead to errors and compliance risks.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for finance officers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar reconciliation challenges
DM outreach to finance officers with demo video links
Engage in community forums for finance officers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try error flagging for discrepancies and reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflows
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Allow CSV import for existing reconciliation data
Enable one-click export of reconciliation reports
